summary: Alonso's championship gamble intensifies as Aston Martin deploys a major upgrade at the Hungaroring, with the veteran desperate to prove the investment justifies his continued commitment to the struggling team. McLaren and Ferrari battle for position in the midfield fight, where subtle setup choices and qualifying strategy could fracture the fragile pecking order on this notoriously unforgiving circuit. A strong result here could shift the title momentum decisively, offering Alonso genuine hope of closing the gap or condemning Aston Martin to another season of unfulfilled potential.
